Very slow service. Only one person for everything... For a place like this, it's surprising!

reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion. Buena ubicacion. Baños impecables. Dos cosas para mejorar. El acceso a la estacion... pozos y tierra.. barro.. etc.. y fundamental no habia nafta infinia ni aceite para el motor. Entiendo demoras en el transporte y demas pero esta en una ruta importante. Planificar mejor.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Good location. Spotless restrooms. Two things to improve. The access to the station... potholes, dirt, mud, etc. And, crucially, there was no Infinia gasoline or engine oil. I understand delays in transportation and such, but it's on a major highway. Better planning is needed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5NE12cE5BEAE
